leadText: Baguette (Japanese: バゲット Baguette) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX. It is currently unobtainable.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A long loaf sliced into top and bottom halves. Its aroma of wheat and its straightforward, salty flavor make it pair well with all kinds of sandwich ingredients.

Its aroma of wheat and its straightforward, salty flavor make it pair well with all kinds of sandwich ingredients. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] This item is unobtainable.
